news_items.headline: Phillies ace Sánchez has consecutive shutout innings streak ended at 50 2/3 by Padres

Padres cut ties with outfielder Nick Castellanos after a rough 39-game stint
news_items.summary: Castellanos never returned to his two-time All-Star form in limited action with San Diego. He hit .191 with a .560 OPS, four home runs and 20 RBIs in 39 games for the Padres.
